summary: Completed comprehensive testing of VaultKeeper password manager application. Backend APIs are working well with 85% success rate. Frontend UI is functional with successful login, registration, space creation, credential management, and navigation flows.

minor_issues.issue: Fixed KeyError in check_brute_force function - was accessing 'locked_until' field without checking existence
minor_issues.impact: Was causing 500 errors on failed login attempts

minor_issues.issue: Fixed user ID inconsistency - get_current_user returned '_id' but endpoints expected 'id'
minor_issues.impact: Was causing 500 errors on space operations

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby warnings in console for DialogContent components

minor_issues.issue: Dialog overlays can block interactions with background elements
